prd.user_story: As a developer debugging a Kubernetes issue, I see rest.Config in a stack trace but only have kubernetes/kubernetes locally — I need to find which repo and file defines this type authoritatively.
constraints: Find the authoritative definition (not vendored copies).
Include the exact repo, file path, and symbol name.
prd.success_definition: Agent identifies that rest.Config (Config struct) is defined in sg-benchmarks/kubernetes-client-go at rest/config.go.
prd.seed_prompt: The symbol rest.Config appears in a Kubernetes stack trace. Find which repository and file defines the Config struct in the k8s.io/client-go/rest package.
